name: auto-bmad
description: [0.10.3] Auto-BMAD Codex skills for BMAD 6.5 diagnostics and dry-run flow checks.

interface.shortDescription: BMAD status, diagnostics, and workflow routing.
interface.longDescription: Auto-BMAD packages Codex entrypoint skills for BMAD 6.5 fast YAML progress lookup, diagnostics, command menus, dry-run routing checks, and execution guidance. Full workflow skills are generated from the Claude command files into each target project's .agents/skills directory by npx @bramvera/auto-bmad init.
defaultPrompt: Use $auto-bmad to show fast YAML progress status and suggest the next story or epic.
Use $auto-bmad menu to list available Auto-BMAD workflows.
Use $auto-bmad-check to check whether Auto-BMAD quick mode can run here.
